summary: Loyalty Points + Birthday Promo feature fully verified end-to-end (frontend only). 13/13 scenarios from spec PASS. Main happy path (M-0001 SILVER birthday): subtotal 117.000 -> auto-applied 10% birthday discount -> bigTotal 105.300, MemberRibbon shows all required testids (SILVER tier, 245 = Rp 245.000, +10 pt, pink birthday banner, toggle auto-CHECKED). PaymentModal amber loyalty card + pink birthday toggle behave exactly per spec. MAX button correctly caps to Math.ceil(105300/1000)=106 (NOT the full 245 balance). Toggling birthday off recalculates to 11.000 (=117000-106000) with loyalty preserved at 106. NOL resets redemption to 0. Confirm with 200.000 cash produces receipt with 'Promo Ultah -11.700', 'TOTAL 105.300', 'Poin Didapat +10 pt'. IndexedDB after finalize: customer M-0001 points=255 (245-0+10), lifetimeSpend=1.355.300 (1.250.000+105.300), lastVisitAt updated. transactions latest row carries birthdayDiscount=11700, loyaltyRedeem=0, loyaltyRedeemPoints=0, loyaltyEarnedPoints=10, grandTotal=105300, customer.memberNumber=M-0001. Edge cases: M-0004 -> BRONZE + birth-month selector (no banner, no discount, bigTotal stays 3.500). M-0003 -> GOLD tier (no birthday banner since not in birth month). Regression: no-customer flow works — no MemberRibbon, no loyalty/birthday cards in PaymentModal, receipt has no 'Poin Didapat' line, transaction TRX-20260622-0002 completes successfully.

issues: Minor: the member-points-balance element's textContent is '245 = Rp 245.000' (Saldo Poin label is sibling, not inside this testid). If a future test asserts an exact format like '245 pt' it should adapt. Not a bug — just a note on the DOM shape.

critical_code_review_comments: VERIFIED: hooks/useTotals.js is single source of truth — Header (pos-big-total), TransactionGrid totals, and PaymentModal all reflect identical computed values (117.000 -> 105.300 -> 0 -> 11.000 -> 105.300) without drift through the entire flow.
VERIFIED: birthday math uses Math.round(lineTotal * 0.1) producing exact 11.700 for 117.000 — no rounding ambiguity (confirmed in DB latestTrx.birthdayDiscount=11700).
VERIFIED: MAX redemption cap math is correct — Math.min(customer.points=245, Math.ceil((117000-11700)/1000)=106) = 106. Points are NOT wasted to zero out beyond what's needed.

VERIFIED: posStore.finalize() correctly invokes api.applyLoyalty when customer.id is present; customer.points updated (+earned -redeemed), lifetimeSpend incremented by grandTotal (not subtotal), lastVisitAt set to ISO timestamp.
VERIFIED: setCustomer auto-toggles birthdayDiscount only when isBirthdayMonth(customer.birthMonth) is true (M-0001 yes, M-0003/M-0004 no).
VERIFIED: Tier mapping per spec — M-0001 lifetimeSpend=1.250.000 -> SILVER, M-0003 lifetimeSpend=5.840.000 -> GOLD, M-0004 -> BRONZE.
VERIFIED: receipt (escpos.js) prints 'Promo Ultah -11.700' and 'Poin Didapat +10 pt' for member trx; omits both lines on non-member trx (regression receipt for TRX-...-0002 has neither).
VERIFIED: F-keys still work post-feature: F11 opens customer lookup, F5 opens payment, F9 cancels (after enrol-modal). Regression untouched.
(LOW) Carry-over from iter 6: Radix DialogContent missing aria-describedby on several modals — cosmetic console warning only.
seed_data_creation: IndexedDB cleared at start of run; seedIfEmpty repopulated M-0001..M-0004 with new fields (points, lifetimeSpend, birthMonth). M-0001 birthMonth=current (verified via auto-checked toggle). M-0003 lifetimeSpend=5.84M (verified GOLD badge).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Loyalty + Birthday feature is stable and complete. Key testids in use: member-ribbon, member-tier, member-points-balance, member-points-to-earn, member-birthday-banner, member-birthday-toggle, member-birth-month-edit, payment-loyalty-input, payment-loyalty-max, payment-birthday-toggle. IndexedDB name is 'retail_pos_db' (NOT 'pos_db'). When clearing for fresh-start tests, delete both names. Login flow: data-testid login-username-input/login-pin-input/login-submit-btn. Shift open: shift-opening-cash-input / shift-open-btn. POS scan: pos-scan-input. Big header total: pos-big-total. F11 customer lookup modal opens a Radix dialog whose ONLY input is the member-number/phone field — no data-testid on the input itself (use '[role=dialog] input').

scenario_results.S8_pay_200000_cash_confirm_receipt: PASS (TRX-20260622-0001, receipt shows Promo Ultah -11.700, TOTAL 105.300, Poin Didapat +10 pt)
scenario_results.S10_edge_M0004_bronze_no_banner_month_se: PASS (BRONZE + birth-month-edit, no 10% applied, bigTotal stays 3.500)
scenario_results.S11_edge_M0003_gold: PASS (GOLD badge, no birthday banner since not birth month)
scenario_results.S12_regression_no_customer_flow: PASS (no MemberRibbon, no loyalty card in PaymentModal, TRX-20260622-0002 completes, no 'Poin Didapat' line on receipt)
